main.description: A blind-signed trophy proving bounty fulfillment. The token was blinded before signing, so the issuer cannot link this trophy to the specific job that earned it. Portable, verifiable, unlinkable.

signature.description: RSA-PSS blind signature (base64url). Verifiable against the issuer's published trophy public key.

nullifier.description: SHA-256 hash derived deterministically from the token. Used to prevent double-presentation.

issuerDid.description: DID of the bounty board that issued this trophy.

tier.description: Trophy tier — determined by the bounty's trophyTier field.

boardId.description: Identifier of the bounty board instance that issued this trophy.
